# Benefit Metric — Minimal Smoke Test Fixture

**Feature:** smoke-test-feature
**Status:** Active
**Date:** 2026-03-29
**Linked discovery:** artefacts/smoke-test-feature/discovery.md

## Primary metric

**Name:** facilitator-export-time
**Type:** Efficiency
**Baseline:** 20 minutes per session (manual copy)
**Target:** < 30 seconds per session
**Measurement method:** Time facilitator from clicking export to having a usable file. Measured via session observation (5 facilitators, 3 sessions each).
**Signal:** Track via usage analytics — count of export button clicks vs manual copy incidents reported.

## Directional indicators

- Number of support requests mentioning "manual copy" or "export" → target: 0 within 30 days of release
- Facilitator satisfaction score for reporting workflow → target: increase from current 3.2 to 4.0+ (5-point scale)

## Meta-benefit check

This is NOT a meta-benefit situation. The metric measures a real user outcome (time saved), not whether our process improved.
